TextView.android:text:
Hydration Tips
1. Drink Water Regularly Sip water throughout the day, not just when you’re thirsty.
2. Start Your Day with Water Drink a glass of water first thing in the morning.
3. Carry a Water Bottle Keep a bottle with you to remind yourself to drink.
4. Eat Water-Rich Foods Include fruits like watermelon and oranges.
5. Set Reminders Use alarms or apps to remind you to drink water.
6. Drink Before Meals Have a glass of water before eating.
7. Limit Sugary Drinks Avoid sodas and replace them with water.
8. Hydrate During Exercise Drink water before, during, and after workouts.
9. Check Your Urine Color Light yellow means you are well hydrated.
10. Stay Consistent Make hydration a daily habit.
